prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-OHDTS-6PC-8-ORNG-BUN-1 Product Type: ANCHOR_STAKE Brand (from catalog): Generic Existing Title: (6 Piece) ASR Outdoor Heavy Duty Tent Pegs - Orange Description: This 6-Pack of Neon Orange Tent Stakes is the ideal replacement for the tent stakes that come with your tent. It seems every outing you come back with one missing or bent because they are not made like these heavy duty after market tent stakes.

Constructed from heavy duty galvanized steel, these are the essential stake for the secure anchoring of tents, tarps, canopies, landscape trim, patio & garden structures.

The orange pull cord hook head is an added feature that is extremely useful for inserting and removing from even the hardest packed surfaces.

Make sure to grab a set of these before your next camping trip. Search Terms: tent grow canopy camping beach pop up stakes backpacking 2 person instant play 4 bed kids fan 6 truck rooftop party canvas kit complete 3 cabin season cot teepee for poles heater screen one cat hammock 8 1 car dog suv baby shower light 20x20 Features: - Length: 8" - Constructed of Heavy Duty Steel - Color: Orange - Touch PVC Pull Cord Head - Milled Point Inserts Easily in Hard Packed Surfaces === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Generic 6-Pack 8" Orange Heavy Duty Tent Stakes

anthropic.title_differentiation: Galvanized Steel, Pull Cord Hook Head, Milled Point, Hard Packed Surface, Camping And Tarp Anchoring

openai.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Galvanized Steel, Milled Point, PVC Pull Cord Head, Easy Insert And Remove, Hard Packed Soil
